Container.Name: podcast-ad-remover
Container.Overview:
Podcast Ad Remover 1.3.1 - self-hosted podcast processing for downloading episodes, removing ads or promos with local transcription and LLM analysis, and publishing replacement RSS feeds for podcast clients.
Features: - Local Whisper/faster-whisper transcription and FFmpeg audio cutting. - Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter provider support. - Per-podcast and unified RSS feeds. - Optional management login, feed tokens, public subscribe page, and admin notifications. - Persistent SQLite database and media storage under /data.
Container.Description: Podcast Ad Remover downloads podcasts, removes ads with local transcription and LLM analysis, then publishes clean RSS feeds.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Web UI and generated RSS/audio links.

Config.Name: Internal Data
Config.Description: SQLite database, downloaded podcast files, generated feeds, models, backups, and logs.

Config.Name: Session Secret Key
Config.Description: Stable random secret used for signed sessions and optional authentication. Generate a long value before enabling dashboard or feed authentication.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public URL that podcast clients can reach. Use your LAN URL for local installs or an HTTPS reverse-proxy URL for remote access.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true only when users access the app through HTTPS.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy Headers
Config.Description: Set to true only behind a trusted reverse proxy that strips client-supplied forwarding headers.

Config.Name: Gemini API Key
Config.Description: Google Gemini API key. Optional if configured later in Admin > AI Settings > Text Analysis. Multiple keys can be comma-separated.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key. Optional if configured later in Admin > AI Settings > Text Analysis.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Anthropic API key. Optional if configured later in Admin > AI Settings > Text Analysis.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: OpenRouter API key. Optional if configured later in Admin > AI Settings > Text Analysis.
